# mgc_container_registry_member (Resource)

Manages the membership of a user in a Container Registry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mgc_container_registry_member" "member" {
  registry_id = mgc_container_registries.registry.id
  user_id     = mgc_container_registry_user.user.id
  role        = "developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `registry_id` (String) ID of the registry the user is being added to
- `user_id` (String) ID of the container registry user to add as a member

### Optional

- `role` (String) Role assigned to the member (e.g. project_admin, developer, guest)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the membership was created
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the membership entry
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the membership was last updated
